name: github_create_org_copilot_space
description: Create an organization Copilot Space (POST /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces). name required; optional description, general_instructions, base_role, resources_attributes. Returns HTTP 201. See [Create an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-spaces?apiVersion=20
